title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: Fennel essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial properties, which help combat bacteria that cause inflammation and damage to gum tissue. The oil's anesthetic and anti-inflammatory effects also reduce pain and swelling associated with periodontitis, making it a natural remedy for alleviating symptoms. Additionally, fennel essential oil's ability to stimulate blood flow and promote collagen synthesis helps to regenerate damaged gums and bone. This...
